hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path"; EXT="${FILE##*.}"; case "$EXT" in js|ts|jsx|tsx) npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "{\"message\": \"Linted: $FILE\"}" || echo "{\"message\": \"Lint issues in: $FILE\"}" ;; py) python3 -m pylint "$FILE" --disable=all --enable=E 2>/dev/null && echo "{\"message\": \"Linted: $FILE\"}" || true ;; *) echo "{\"message\": \"No linter for .$EXT\"}" ;; esac'
